description_long: This chair features a round, cushioned seat and a tall, winged backrest that curves outward at the top, providing both comfort and a distinctive visual flair. The seat and backrest are upholstered in a dark material, likely faux leather or vinyl, giving it a sleek and modern appearance. The chair is supported by a single central metal column that connects to a wide, circular base, ensuring stability. The base and support column are finished in a dark, possibly powder-coated metal, complementing the upholstery. There are no visible armrests, and the design is streamlined, making it suitable for urban environments such as cafes, bars, or waiting areas. The overall construction suggests durability and ease of cleaning, ideal for high-traffic public spaces.
description: A modern chair with a round cushioned seat, tall winged backrest, and a single central metal support on a circular base, upholstered in dark material.
description_view_0: Side view showing the round seat, tall backrest, and single central support column with a circular base.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wide, winged backrest that curves outward and the central support structure.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the seat, backrest, and support column.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the full width of the winged backrest and the round seat.
